Ingredients proven by science

Sculptique Ingredients:

  • Echinacea purpurea Extract – Known for its anti-inflammatory properties, it may support skin health.
  • Dandelion Extract – Traditionally used as a diuretic, it may help reduce water retention.
    Burdock Powder – Contains antioxidants that may promote skin clarity.
  • Cleavers Extract – Believed to support lymphatic drainage and detoxification.
  • Rutin – A flavonoid that may strengthen blood vessels and improve circulation.
  • Bromelain Powder – An enzyme from pineapple that may reduce inflammation and support tissue repair.
  • Lemon Powder – Rich in vitamin C, it may aid in collagen production and skin rejuvenation.
  • Kelp Extract – A source of iodine and minerals that may support skin metabolism.

These natural ingredients work together to reduce puffiness, bloating, fluid retention.

How does it actually work?

Sculptique works by improving blood flow and supporting lymphatic drainage to reduce fluid buildup that causes puffiness, inflammation, and water retention. It also reduces inflammation and boosts collagen production to help skin become firmer and smoother.

Shipping and returns

All of Sculptique orders get FREE shipping straight from our USA warehouse. Orders are usually shipped out within 1-2 working days, and you should receive the order within 3-7 working days for domestic USA orders, and within 10 working days for International orders.

We also offer a 60-day money back guarantee - if you are unsatisfied with our product, you can take advantage of our guarantee and ship back the product to us to get your return within 60 days of receiving your order.

Why Your Bloating, Brain Fog & Swollen Legs Are Actually Connected

If you're experiencing more than one of these symptoms, your body is trying to tell you something:

Your stomach is flat in the morning, but by evening you look six months pregnant.

Your ankles disappear into "kankles" by the end of the day.

That dimpled, cottage cheese texture on your thighs won't go away no matter what you try.

You feel foggy and exhausted even after a full night's sleep.

You wake up stiff and achy, like your body aged overnight.

The Connection You've Been Missing

Why Your Bloating, Brain Fog & Swollen Legs Are Actually Connected

If you're experiencing more than one of these symptoms, your body is trying to tell you something:
Why Your Bloating, Brain Fog & Swollen Legs Are Actually Connected

Your stomach is flat in the morning, but by evening you look six months pregnant.

Your Hidden Drainage System

Your lymphatic system is your body's internal cleaning crew—a network of vessels that processes 3-4 liters of cellular waste and excess fluid every single day.

When it's working properly, you don't even know it exists.

  • Waste gets drained away
  • Fluid stays balanced.
  • Your body feels light and energized.

But after age 35, declining estrogen hijacks this system's ability to function.

  • Vessel pumping weakens.
  • One-way valves fail.
  • Protein clogs form.
  • Vessel walls become leaky.

Instead of processing and removing waste, it backs up in your tissues.

Why Nothing Has Worked

You cut out gluten, dairy, sugar. You ate clean for months.

Why it failed

Your diet only addressed what goes IN. It didn't fix your body's broken ability to drain what's already there.

You tried viral lymphatic drops from TikTok.

Why it failed

They’re just pricey water with trace herbs. The “active ingredients” are destroyed by stomach acid, and even if absorbed, only act as a mild diuretic. No vessel repair, no protein breakdown—just expensive urine.

You got lymphatic massage or bought compression socks.

Why it failed

Temporary manual movement. Within 24-48 hours, everything backed up again because your vessels still can't pump on their own.

You cut out gluten, dairy, sugar. You ate clean for months.

Why it failed

Your diet only addressed what goes IN. It didn't fix your body's broken ability to drain what's already there.

The 8-Ingredient System That Restores What Hormones Once Maintained

Sculptique is the only formula that addresses ALL 6 mechanisms of lymphatic dysfunction simultaneously—not with symbolic doses, but with therapeutic amounts based on clinical research.
Not just moving fluid temporarily. Not just reducing inflammation. Complete restoration.

Reactivate Lymphatic Pumps

Cleavers Extract (100mg)

Restores rhythmic vessel contractions that move lymph through your system. Contains iridoids that "wake up" muscle cells in vessel walls. 2024 study showed enhanced immune cell activity for better waste clearance.

Proven gentle diuretic that increases fluid excretion without harsh side effects. Human trial showed statistically significant increase in urination frequency (p<0.05) and excretion ratio (p<0.001).

Lymphatic Drainage by Sculptique™ contains ingredients that are scientifically proven to enhance microcirculation, boost lymphatic drainage, and reduce inflammation, which restores your tissue and breaks down the fat cells in your skin.”

How is this different from lymphatic drops I saw on TikTok?

Lymphatic drops have poor bioavailability—liquid ingredients pass through your digestive system too quickly to be properly absorbed. Most contain only milligrams of herbs (symbolic amounts, not therapeutic doses) and act as basic diuretics that pull water from your bloodstream, not from tissue swelling.

Sculptique uses capsules with therapeutic doses (100-500mg per ingredient) that are properly absorbed and work at the cellular level to restore vessel function, break down protein clogs, and strengthen vessel walls—not just make you urinate more.

 Why didn't my diet changes work?

Your diet only addressed what goes INTO your system (inflammation from food). It didn't fix your body's broken ability to drain what's already there. That's why you could eat perfectly clean and still wake up bloated—the backed-up lymphatic waste was still pooling in your tissues.

How long until I see results?

Most women notice something within the first week—feeling lighter, less bloated, morning puffiness fading faster. Visible changes happen by weeks 2-3. Transformation becomes undeniable by weeks 4-6. But true restoration takes time—we recommend 90 days for complete results.

Here's where we're at right now:

Stop Masking Symptoms. Start Restoring Root Cause.

You deserve to feel like yourself again. To wake up without puffiness. To see your ankles. To look in the mirror and recognize the vibrant woman staring back. To have energy for the people you love.

You deserve a solution that actually works. Not temporary relief. Not symptom masking. Complete lymphatic restoration.
